query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "occ-rag: optimal cognitive core for faithful question answering" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on image generation and visual retrieval mechanisms, which is an off-domain application compared to the user's question regarding linguistic question answering and the "OCC-RAG" framework. While both involve "Retrieval Augmented Generation" (RAG), the specific mechanism (patch-level visual retrieval vs. cognitive core for text) and the domain (computer vision vs. linguistics/NLP) are distinct, failing the criteria for same-mechanism evidence or shared empirical population.
